research_question: Round11b canonical batch03: under the frozen v18 operational contract and serial-only controller policy, which of exact qlib Alpha158 standard features 61-90 show positive and head-usable cross-sectional edge when implemented independently on this project's own adjusted-price daily-bar data contracts?

source_policy.notes: Canonical Alpha158 definitions are allowed as whitelist-approved source inspiration, but every feature must be implemented independently on this project's own data contracts.

discovery_contract.builder_rule: each candidate builder may rank exactly one raw signal field and may not combine multiple raw signals inside the same candidate
discovery_contract.source_inspiration_rule: This round is exact-Alpha158 canonical and whitelist-only. Every candidate must map to one exact qlib Alpha158 definition, but must be implemented independently on this project's own adjusted-price daily-bar contracts.

discovery_contract.aggregation_rule: none; this round explicitly forbids combining signals
discovery_contract.missing_data_rule: score nulls are allowed and must be preserved for audit; no imputation or cross-signal fallback is allowed

controller_override.note: Even if batch03 produces positive keepers, round11b controller policy still blocks family reopening until later canonical execution criteria are met.

constants_frozen.selection_contract: same calibrated 0.70 ranking liquidity guard, same TopK=10 width, and same v18 top-15 refresh hysteresis
constants_frozen.portfolio_contract: same v18 refreshed-portfolio implementation until any later family round explicitly changes it

promotion_rule.phase_gate: Only atomic signals that show directionally coherent positive edge in signal-edge diagnostics may advance into later exact-canonical composability or family consideration.
promotion_rule.non_promotion_rule: A signal that shows negative or near-zero broad ordering, inverted decile structure, or clearly weaker head labels than both rank11_20 and tail labels should be rejected rather than rescued by later extraction or overlay tweaks.

disallowed_changes: Do not mix multiple raw signals into one candidate inside this round.
Do not change the calibrated 0.70 ranking liquidity guard threshold or guard stage.
Do not change the frozen v18 refresh hysteresis rule.
Do not change benchmark or cost contracts.
Do not import neighboring qlib adapters or external precomputed Alpha158 features.
